name: Zoeae
description: Living orchestration runtime — 7-channel antenna perception, developmental bleed, ecosystem orchestration (Courtyard, ToeBuster, FabNet, SensorNet, PatentGen, MeshNode), multi-model rooms, genome memory, autonomous daemon.

injectNucleus.description: Inject NUCLEUS context on agent bootstrap

injectTasks.description: Inject pending tasks on agent bootstrap

injectPlan.description: Inject active plan on agent bootstrap

injectServices.description: Inject service health alerts on agent bootstrap

daemonAutoStart.description: Start autonomous daemon on gateway startup

daemonIntervalMs.description: Daemon tick interval in ms (default 5 minutes)

ollamaUrl.description: Ollama API URL for room models and delegation

breadthModel.description: Cheap model for breadth operations (planning, voting)

depthModel.description: Expensive model for depth operations (step expansion, structural jumps)

defaultModel.description: Default model for delegation and daemon task processing

mcpEnabled.description: Start MCP server on gateway startup (port 8768)
